content.full_text:
June 18, 1991

Mr. Mark T. Morodami  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite 800  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Mr. Morodami:

A few months ago we exchanged phone calls and correspondence related to paying parking bills from the airport with campaign funds. Your office's reference number to this subject is A-91-074.

I now have a further question. Can a portion of the overall bill (up to $250.00) be declared as a gift, and the balance paid off? For example, if the bill for 1991 was a total of $1,000.00, could $250.00 be declared as a gift and a check for $750.00 be sent to pay off the balance?

Please feel free to contact me at 5-7550 if I can be of any assistance.

Thank you in advance for your consideration of this matter.

Sincerely,

Kimberly Schuld  
Legislative Aide
